name: Abengane
description: Abengane is one of the hunters hired by Battera to try and complete the game. His power becomes clear after he has a bomb placed on him by Bomber: He can remove Nen curses placed by other. This means that he is the Jyounen user the Phantom Troupe is looking for. He is eventually hired by Hisoka to remove Chrollo's curse.
